remaining_spec_items: Sprint 2: Analytics Middleware + Request Tracking — middleware/analytics.py, path exclusion, fire-and-forget threading, app.py registration, unit tests

Sprint 3: Dashboard SQL Queries (7 files) — dashboards/ directory, 7 SQL files (user activity, project analytics, model performance, job execution, API usage, cost allocation, system health), unit tests
Sprint 4: Dashboard Provisioning + Admin Integration — provision_dashboard.py, Lakeview SDK, /api/admin/analytics/summary endpoint, AdminAnalytics.tsx tab, unit tests
Sprint 5: Integration Test + Installation Test + Documentation — E2E test, SQL query validation, full pytest, clean install, admin guide update, commit+push
